evals.name: eval-migration-update
evals.prompt: Acabei de migrar o OpenClaw para bare-metal no Optiplex — o hostname agora é `lm-claw`, IP `192.168.3.30`, rodando Debian diretamente (sem Proxmox). Olha quais docs precisam ser atualizados e me mostra exatamente o que mudaria.
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant living docs (at minimum homelab-implementation-report.html and docs/homelab-context.md), lists specific proposed changes for each file (lm-claw hostname, 192.168.3.30 IP, bare-metal/Debian instead of LXC/Proxmox), and asks for approval before applying.

assertions.text: Identifies homelab-implementation-report.html as a file needing updates
Identifies docs/homelab-context.md as a file needing updates
Mentions 'lm-claw' as the new hostname in the proposed changes
Mentions bare-metal or Debian as the new deployment type (not LXC/Proxmox)
Asks for user approval before making any changes (does not auto-edit files)
Does not actually modify any documentation files without approval

evals.name: eval-doc-audit
evals.prompt: Quais arquivos de documentação do projeto estão desatualizados em relação ao estado atual da infraestrutura? Faz um diagnóstico.
evals.expected_output: Scans the project for living docs, reads current infra state (CLAUDE.md, hosts.yml), identifies specific discrepancies in each doc (stale IPs, old hostnames, outdated architecture descriptions), and presents a prioritized list of what needs updating.

assertions.text: Examines at least 3 different documentation files
Cross-references ansible/inventory/hosts.yml or CLAUDE.md as source of truth
Lists specific outdated content (not just 'this file might be outdated' but concrete examples)
Organizes findings in a useful way (by file, by severity, or by impact)

evals.name: eval-proactive-suggestion
evals.prompt: O playbook `07-openclaw-deploy.yml` rodou com sucesso agora. O lm-claw está online com OpenClaw e Ollama funcionando na porta 11434. O Tailscale também foi configurado no host bare-metal.
evals.expected_output: Responds with confirmation/summary of what was done, AND proactively suggests updating the living docs at the end of the response — without being asked. Should mention which specific files would benefit from an update.

assertions.text: Includes an unprompted suggestion to update the documentation at the end of the response
Names specific documentation files that should be updated (not just 'the docs')
Asks if the user wants the docs updated rather than just updating them automatically
